nodes.name: ClickUp Webhook
nodes.notes: ClickUp developer webhook (list-scoped, taskStatusUpdated + taskTagUpdated) POSTs here. Responds 200 immediately so ClickUp never records a >7s failure. The random string in the path IS the auth.

nodes.name: Ping ntfy (wake Mac)
nodes.notes: Content-free wake ping. Carries NO task data on purpose, so the public ntfy topic leaks nothing. Your Mac's kick_bridge.sh subscribes to this same topic. Must match NTFY_URL in wake/.env.
